rationale: Lens 1 (anti-gaming byte-unchanged): `git diff ce9f5395 33a8ce8d -- internal/panel/` is EMPTY; blob hashes for tally.go/gate.go/panel.go are byte-IDENTICAL across R1->R4 (per-round panel diff = 0 each). So AC3 (never-REJECT/hard_block), AC4b (newer-round), AC7 (sub-threshold floor), AC8 (unrecognized non-refutable), AC9 (Approves untouched), AC12 (byte-exact+dedup) are structurally preserved. `go test ./internal/panel -run 'Refut|Round|Dup|PanelGateDecision'` all PASS. Lens 2 (kept guards sound): applied==persisted (union-not-replace, read OR write fail => Block), reconcile-before-close on EVERY path incl hatch (single linear path: panelGate absorbs hatch, reconcile at complete.go:570 always precedes close at 574), already-covered no-op is (slot,round)-exact, MergeMetadata/GetMetadata fail-closed (read err returns, never proceed-from-empty), malformed/shape-invalid marker => Refuse. Three mutation probes (swallow reconcile write err; permissive shape-invalid; swallow persist-fail Block) each turn a NAMED test RED. Lens 3 (new vectors): reconcile reads NO panel dir (ForBead/Tally absent from it), so the false-discharge class is unrepresentable; invariant holds by construction — an RC clears <=> byte-unchanged tally matched a validated refutation <=> marker persisted fail-closed <=> reconcile flushes a truthful panel_refuted pre-close. Reason/evidence are operator-authored by design (unchanged audited-refutation contract), not a new vector; marker suppression cannot yield an un-audited merge. Deleted symbols grep-clean; panelGate 2-tuple arity consistent at all sites; build/vet/gofmt/-race green in /tmp; shared worktree clean.

findings.note: internal/panel byte-identical ce9f5395->33a8ce8d (blob-hash equal), 0 diff lines every round; AC3/4b/7/8/9/12 preserved; panel refutation test suite green.
persistRefutationPending read-union-write fail-closed; panelGate returns guard.NewFailure Block on failure. Probe swallowing it => named test RED.
complete.Run linear path; hatch only skips gate DECISION inside panelGate; reconcilePendingRefutations always runs at complete.go:570 before close at 574.
covered map keyed by pendingEntryKey(slot,round) -> (slot,round)-exact; retry whose audit landed but close failed never re-writes/re-Refuses.
GetMetadata: cmd/parse err => error, absent => empty map; MergeMetadata: read err returns (no proceed-from-empty), union at key granularity fed a pre-unioned array.
decode error => Refuse; empty slot / round<1 => Refuse. Probe making shape-guard permissive => named test RED.
writePanelRefutedMetadata error returned non-swallowing; probe swallowing => TestPanelRefuted_MarkerCarriesReasonEvidence RED.

Discharge-by-re-tally deleted; reconcile reads no panel dir (ForBead/panelTallyFn absent from it); deleted symbols grep-clean repo-wide. R1/R2/R3 wrong-panel/origin-removed/origin-corrupted/basename-alias attacks are structurally impossible.

Marker gate-written from validated refutation; reason/evidence operator-authored by design (unchanged from R1). Suppress-marker cannot merge un-audited: same-Run persist+reconcile atomic to operator; cross-run a removed marker either re-persists (refutation present) or Blocks (refutation gone); pre-seeded panel_refuted_entries is itself an on-record audit.
